name: Beyond Belief (Agnostic Meeting)
notes: Beyond Belief is an agnostic and freethinkers meeting of Alcoholics Anonymous. All are welcome. Please do not smoke anywhere on library property and attendees are asked to keep voices down outside the meeting room in the main lobby of the library.

name: 5pm Candlelight Meeting (in-person)
notes:
***NOTE***
The 5 pm Candlelight group will not be able to meet at the Kin Hut, where it normally meets, on Monday July 1st because of Canada Day Celebrations happening at Departure Bay Beach. Instead, we will be meeting in the field of Departure Bay Centennial Park, across the road from the beach, with parking on Wingrove street. It is hoped that there will be lots of room for us to meet there even with the busy festivities at the beach that day. Please bring chairs.

name: Nanaimo Recovery Activities Group
notes:
Come by Friday evenings for some physical activity or just some casual fellowship.

We typically meet at the basketball court and various activites break out. Feel free to shoot some hoops, toss a ball or frisbee or just connect outside for some fresh air and sobriety.
